zh.lifeSummary: 當Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla於大約1242年出生在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩時，她的父親Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León22歲，母親Mayor Guillén de Guzmán38歲。她於1253年5月20日與Afonso III Rei de Portugal在葡萄牙比拉 雷亞爾查韋斯桑托 斯特凡結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1283年住在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞。她去世於1303年10月27日在葡萄牙利斯波亞托利斯 維德拉斯享年62歲，埋葬在葡萄牙萊里亞阿爾可巴薩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla于大约1242年出生在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩时，她的父亲Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León22岁，母亲Mayor Guillén de Guzmán38岁。她于1253年5月20日与Afonso III Rei de Portugal在葡萄牙比拉 雷亞爾查韋斯桑托 斯特凡结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1283年住在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞。她去世于1303年10月27日在葡萄牙利斯波亞托利斯 維德拉斯享年62岁，埋葬在葡萄牙萊里亞阿爾可巴薩。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

nameMeanings.name: Beatriz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Beatrix  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla was born about 1242, in Zaragoza, Aragón, Spain, her father, Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León, was 22 and her mother, Mayor Guillén de Guzmán, was 38. She married Afonso III Rei de Portugal on 20 May 1253, in Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portugal. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She lived in Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain in 1283. She died on 27 October 1303, in Torres Vedras, Lisbon, Portugal, at the age of 62, and was buried in Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla est née environ 1242, à Zaragoza, Aragón, Espagne, son père, Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mayor Guillén de Guzmán, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Afonso III Rei de Portugal le 20 mai 1253, à Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle a vécu à Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne en 1283. Elle est décédée le 27 octobre 1303, à Torres Vedras, Lisboa, Portugal, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla um 1242 in Zaragoza, Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León 22 und ihre Mutter Mayor Guillén de Guzmán 38. Sie hat am 20. Mai 1253 in Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portugal Afonso III Rei de Portugal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1283 hat sie in Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien gelebt. Sie starb am 27. Oktober 1303 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Torres Vedras, Lisboa, Portugal und wurde in Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla è nata il circa 1242 nel Zaragoza, Aragón, Spagna, sua padre, Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mayor Guillén de Guzmán, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Afonso III Rei de Portugal il 20 maggio 1253, nel Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna nel 1283. Morì il 27 ottobre 1303, nel Torres Vedras, Lisboa, Portogallo, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Alcobaça, Leiria, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castillaが約1242年にスペインアラグoンザラゴザで生まれた時，父Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y Leónは22歳，母Mayor Guillén de Guzmánは38歳であった。1253年5月20日にポルトガルヴィラ レアルチャベスサントー エストevaオでAfonso III Rei de Portugalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1283年にはスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラに住んでいた。彼女は1303年10月27日にポルトガルリスボアトレス ベドラスで62歳で死去し，ポルトガルレアイリアアルコバcアにて埋葬された。

ko.Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portug: 포르투갈 빌라 리 차브스 산토 에스트e브a오
ko.lifeSummary: Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla(이)가 대략 1242년 스페인 아라그o 자라고자에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mayor Guillén de Guzmán(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1253년 5월 20일 포르투갈 빌라 리 차브스 산토 에스트e브a오에서 Afonso III Rei de Portugal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1283년도에 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라에서 살았다. 그녀는 1303년 10월 27일 포르투갈 리스보 토러스 브드라스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 레이리아 알컵아c아에 묻혔다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla nasceu aproximadamente 1242, em Zaragoza, Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mayor Guillén de Guzmán, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Afonso III Rei de Portugal em 20 de maio de 1253, em Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela viveu em Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha em 1283. Ela faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1303, em Torres Vedras, Lisboa, Portugal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal.

ru.Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portug: санто эстeвaо, чавесь, вила риль, Португалия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla родилась около 1242 г. в местности зарагоза, арагoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mayor Guillén de Guzmán, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Afonso III Rei de Portugal 20 мая 1253 г. в местности санто эстeвaо, чавесь, вила риль, Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она жила в местности севилла, андалукiа, Испания в 1283 году. Она умерла 27 октября 1303 г. в местности торресь ведрас, лисбоа, Португалия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности алкобаcа, лиря, Португалия.

es.Of, Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal: Igreja São Cristóvão e São Lourenço, Lisboa, Portugal
es.Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portug: Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portugal
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rainha de Portugal Dona Beatriz de Castilla nació aproximadamente 1242, en Zaragoza, Aragón, España, su papá, Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mayor Guillén de Guzmán, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Afonso III Rei de Portugal el 20 de mayo de 1253, en Santo Estêvão, Chaves, Vila Real, Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Sevilla, Andalucía, España en 1283. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1303, en Torres Vedras, Lisboa, Portugal, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal.
